step_rationale: sPLA-IID involved in immune suppression; inflammatory lipid mediator generation.
mechanism: Secreted phospholipase regulating immune response and lipid mediator synthesis in atherosclerotic plaque inflammation.

references.title: Group IID, IIE, IIF and III secreted phospholipase As.
